testcase.name: tc02

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (988, 452). Other element would receive the click:
(Session info: chrome=138.0.7204.101) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '22.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [b5d35ad7efeb04dbf72197fa08ade400, clickElement {id=f.2BA9CC5ACB89D333A8BC08FEA9A617EF.d.F17431CAD39EFCFA1545350CBADF7AF6.e.2380}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 138.0.7204.101, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 138.0.7204.94 (545025748884..., userDataDir: C:\Users\jainu\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:63177}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:63177/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 138.0.7204.101, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on windows (b5d35ad7efeb04dbf72197fa08ade400)] -> xpath: (//*[@tabindex='0'])[9]] Session ID: b5d35ad7efeb04dbf72197fa08ade400

testcase.error:
